name: Lemon-Herb Lamb Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Boneless center-cut leg of Lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from lamb; cut four evenly spaced 1-inch deep slits in the surface. Combine lemon peel, juice, rosemary, thyme, and pepper; rub onto meat and into slits. Place meat on the rack of a roasting pan. Insert a meat thermometer into the thickest portion. Roast in 325°F oven for 1½ to 1¾ hours or until the thermometer registers 150 degrees F (medium).
2. For sauce, reserve pan juices; skim fat. If necessary, add water to measure 2/3 cup liquid total. In a medium saucepan stir together yogurt, cornstarch, and bouillon granules. Stir in juice mixture. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Serve with sliced meat.
